Test Case Description: New customer opens account - verify 15% discount applied
Preconditions: User is not registered in the system
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
2. Fill in all required information for new customer.
3. Complete account opening process.
4. Make a purchase on the same day.
5. Verify discount applied to purchase
Expected Result:
15% discount is applied to all purchases 
made on account opening day

Test Case Description: Existing customer without loyalty card opens account - verify no discount
Preconditions: User is already registered in the system but does not have a loyalty card
Test Steps:
1. Login as existing customer.
2. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
3. Complete account opening process.
4. Make a purchase.
5. Verify discount applied
Expected Result: No discount is applied to purchases

Test Case Description: Existing customer with loyalty card opens account - verify 10% discount
Preconditions: User is already registered in the system and has a valid loyalty card
Test Steps:
1. Login as existing customer with loyalty card.
2. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
3. Complete account opening process
4. Make a purchase
5. Verify discount applied

Test Case Description: New customer with coupon attempts to use both - verify coupon cannot be used
Preconditions: User is not registered in the system and has a valid coupon code
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
2. Fill in all required information for new customer.
3. Attempt to apply coupon code during account opening.
4. Complete account opening process.
5. Make a purchase.
6. Verify discount applied
Expected Result:
Either coupon cannot be used OR new customer discount is not applied 
(only one discount should be active)

Test Case Description: Existing customer with loyalty card and coupon - verify 30% discount
Preconditions:
1-User is already registered in the system
2-has a valid loyalty card and has a valid coupon code
Test Steps:
1. Login as existing customer with loyalty card
2. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
3. Apply coupon code during account opening.
4. Complete account opening process.
5. Make a purchase.
6. Verify discount calculation

Test Case Description: Existing customer without loyalty card but with coupon - verify 20% discount
Preconditions:
1-User is already registered in the system.
2-does not have a loyalty card but has a valid coupon code
Test Steps:
1. Login as existing customer without loyalty card.
2. Navigate to credit card account opening page.
3. Apply coupon code during account opening.
4. Complete account opening process.
5. Make a purchase.
6. Verify discount applied.
Expected Result: 20% discount (coupon only) is applied to purchases

Test Case Description: Verify discount applies only to purchases made on account opening day
Preconditions: User has opened a credit card account
Test Steps:
1. Open credit card account on Day 1.
2. Make a purchase on Day 1.
3. Verify discount applied.
4. Make a purchase on Day 2.
5. Verify discount status.
Expected Result:
Discount is applied only to purchases made on Day 1 (account opening day). 
Purchases on Day 2 do not receive the discount

Test Case Description: Verify discount calculation accuracy with various purchase amounts
Preconditions: User has opened a credit card account with applicable discount
Test Steps:
1. Open credit card account with 15% discount (new customer).
2. Make purchase of $100.
3. Verify discount calculation (should be $15).
4. Make purchase of $50.
5. Verify discount calculation (should be $7.50).
6. Make purchase of $0.99.
7. Verify discount calculation (should be $0.1485 rounded appropriately).
8. Make purchase of $1000.
9. Verify discount calculation (should be $150)
Expected Result:
Discount is calculated accurately for all purchase amounts: $100 → $15.
$0.99 → $0.1485 (rounded).
$1000 → $150
$50 → $7.50
